design_plan: rng_seed=42; hero_layout=centered; aida=pass; hero_math=2-3 lines @1120px; bento_density=grid-auto-flow:dense; label_sweep=complete; button_contrast=AA
headline: Book rides with AI — compare ETAs, coordinate pickups, and reuse routes automatically

site_brief.audience: people who want an AI assistant to compare, book, and coordinate rides
site_brief.goal: Create an indexable SEO use-case page in the /use-cases/ cluster. Target the practical query 'Book rides with AI', show the exact job-to-be-done, and explain how Super can perform the workflow with real computer use and a reusable computer-use cache. Include sibling use-case links so the cluster feels intentional, crawlable, and useful.
site_brief.title: Book rides with AI
site_brief.use_case_intent: show how Super can help request rides, compare ETAs, handle pickup details, and reuse repeated route preferences

summary: This use‑case page explains how Super works as a personal AI agent that can compare ride options, assist with booking workflows, coordinate pickup details, and reuse your preferences through a computer-use cache. It is designed for people searching for “Book rides with AI” and contrasts Super fairly with assistants like ChatGPT, Gemini, Siri, Grok, Folk, and Orchids.
